title: Razorpay API keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Razorpay LIVE Key ID detected in source code. LIVE Key IDs combined with Key Secrets provide full programmatic access to production Razorpay accounts including payment processing, refunds, settlements, payouts, and customer data. Exposing these credentials allows attackers to initiate fraudulent financial transactions, steal payment information, manipulate settlements, and cause significant financial damage. IMMEDIATELY rotate this key and store securely using environment variables or secret management systems (AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, HashiCorp Vault).

Razorpay Key Secret detected in source code. Key Secrets combined with Key IDs provide complete authentication to Razorpay payment gateway. Exposing these credentials enables attackers to process unauthorized payments, initiate refunds, access customer payment data, manipulate order status, and execute fraudulent payouts causing severe financial and reputational damage. IMMEDIATELY rotate both Key ID and Key Secret, and store securely using environment variables or secret management systems (AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, HashiCorp Vault).
